summon_line_en: The dawn after the dark night is the most beautiful scene in the morning
click_line1_en: War or darkness, I believe it will pass
click_line2_en: It would be too bad to be complacent because of the unfair fate
click_line3_en: Please do not give up, I will always be with you

summon_line: {执行者莱恩娜，参上！}
click_line1: {越具有挑战的事，越能勾起我的兴致。}
click_line2: {聆听风之旋律，执行神之意志。}
click_line3: {可怜虫们还有什么话就留着下一世说吧。}
summon_line_en: Executor Lenna, join us!
click_line1_en: The more challenging something is, the more interesting it is to me.
click_line2_en: Listen to the wind and do God's will.
click_line3_en: Poor wretches, if you have anything else to say, leave it to the next generation

summon_line: {跟随心指引的方向，醒悟命运的真谛，便为觉。}
click_line1: {很多时候我能理解反叛者的想法，但也明白，那些都不是信仰丢失的理由。}
click_line2: {不怀希望便不会失望，但身处黑暗的人，往往更清楚“希望”二字的意义。}
click_line3: {如果被太多负情绪左右，生命也将失去光泽。}
summon_line_en: Follow the direction of the heart, wake up to the true meaning of fate, it is Satoru.
click_line1_en: Most of the time I can understand how rebels feel, but I also understand that those are not reasons to lose Fisis.
click_line2_en: We can never be disappointed without hope, but people in the dark know better than ever what the word "hope" means.
click_line3_en: Inferiority, mean, greed, jealousy, if these emotions, life will lose luster

summon_line: {暗夜过后的破晓，是清晨最美的景象。}
click_line1: {战争也好，黑暗也好，我相信都会过去。}
click_line2: {如果因为命运的不公就变得自怨自艾，那也太逊了。}
click_line3: {请千万不要放弃，我会一直陪在您身边。}
summon_line_en: The dawn after the dark night is the most beautiful scene in the morning
click_line1_en: War or darkness, I believe it will pass
click_line2_en: It would be too bad to be complacent because of the unfair fate
click_line3_en: Please do not give up, I will always be with you

summon_line: {情感如此虚无，只有力量才是一切}
click_line2: {叮咚，我的捕猎开始了}
click_line3: {无剑之人才会葬于剑下}
summon_line_en: Emotions are vain, only power is everything
click_line1_en: Demon will help you, My Lord
click_line2_en: Ding Dong, My hunt time is come
click_line3_en: They doesn’t have buried sword

summon_line: {吵死了，我可不会就这么算了}
click_line1: {能打败我才是对我最大的挑衅}
click_line2: {大人，我从不救无用之人}
click_line3: {我的任务里没有意外，受伤是败者该担心的事}
summon_line_en: It's so noisy, I won't let it go
click_line1_en: Beating me is the biggest challenge to me
click_line2_en: Sir, I never save useless people
click_line3_en: There are no accidents in my mission, injury is something the loser should worry about

summon_line: {这个世界的真相已经展现，我们的希望已经降临}
click_line2: {背离神者终将被神舍弃}
click_line3: {遵从指引，解救苦难才是我的使命}
summon_line_en: The truth of this world has been revealed, our hope has come
click_line1_en: This is God's guidance, Your Excellency
click_line2_en: Those who turn away from God will eventually be abandoned by God
click_line3_en: Following the guidelines, it is my mission to relieve suffering

summon_line: {只有弱者才成群结队}
click_line2: {我为何要相信他人？他们说的一切都是谎言}
click_line3: {母亲，有一颗良善之心也许是值得的}
summon_line_en: Only the weak come in groups
click_line1_en: Funny, my sword only listens to my call
click_line2_en: Why should I trust others? Everything they say is a lie
click_line3_en: Mother, it may be worth having a good heart

summon_line: {真正的强者应该是和平的缔造者}
click_line2: {我始终相信唯有光明才能拯救苦难}
click_line3: {不要担心，我也曾受伤，苦痛终将被希望治愈}
summon_line_en: The real strong should be the maker of peace
click_line1_en: Sir, don't let your guard down
click_line2_en: I always believe that only light can save suffering
click_line3_en: Don't worry, I was hurt too, the pain will be healed by hope

summon_line: {暗夜中的战斗可不能破晓}
click_line1: {夜色才能看尽所有丑陋和肮脏}
click_line2: {我的战斗一旦开始可不会轻易停下}
click_line3: {来了，就别想逃过我的眼睛}
summon_line_en: The battle in the dark night cannot break the dawn
click_line1_en: Only the night can see all the ugliness and filth
click_line2_en: Once my fight starts, it won't stop easily
click_line3_en: Come on, don't try to escape my eyes

summon_line: {想探究我的秘密吗？嘘，仔细听哦～}
click_line2: {这里好热闹，走，去看看}
click_line3: {可怕，世界上竟有如此恐怖之物！}
summon_line_en: Want to explore my secrets? Shhh, listen carefully~
click_line1_en: It's amazing, can I try it?
click_line2_en: It's so lively here, let's go and have a look
click_line3_en: Terrible, there are such terrifying things in the world!

summon_line: {可恶！又失败了！}
click_line2: {不好玩吗？可是我很开心耶}
click_line3: {就决定是你啦！}
summon_line_en: hateful! Failed again!
click_line1_en: Is there anything wrong with being happy?
click_line2_en: Isn't it fun? but i'm happy
click_line3_en: It's up to you!

summon_line: {自由的灵魂才是唯一解}
click_line2: {我并不赞同你的观点}
click_line3: {森林深处是很神奇的！}
summon_line_en: A free soul is the only solution
click_line1_en: Why does nature need standards?
click_line2_en: i don't agree with you
click_line3_en: The depths of the forest are magical!

summon_line: {魔导书的力量，并非用来谋求名利，而是守护那些无辜的生命。}
click_line1: {无论黑暗如何笼罩，我都不会屈服。}
click_line2: {祖母，我会用您教导的力量，去创造一个更美好的世界。}
click_line3: {为和平而战，我义不容辞！}
summon_line_en: The power of the magic book is not used to seek fame and fortune, but to protect those innocent lives.
click_line1_en: No matter how dark it is, I will not give in.
click_line2_en: Grandma, I will use the power of your teachings to create a better world.
click_line3_en: It is my duty to fight for peace!

summon_line: {只要有信念，这风之力量定能指引我前进。}
click_line1: {我要打破这锁链的束缚，守护我所珍视的一切。}
click_line2: {友情是世界上最宝贵的财富，我们将携手共进，无惧风雨。}
click_line3: {我们的命运掌握在自己手中，勇往直前吧！}
summon_line_en: As long as I have faith, the power of this wind will definitely guide me forward.
click_line1_en: I will break the shackles of this chain and protect all that I hold dear.
click_line2_en: Friendship is the most precious wealth in the world, we will go forward hand in hand without fear of wind and rain.
click_line3_en: Our destiny is in our own hands, let's go forward!

summon_line: {纯洁的心将我引向天使的羽翼，水的力量在我手中流淌。}
click_line1: {我誓愿用水的柔和之力，守护大自然与生命的美好。}
click_line2: {友谊如澄澈清泉，我们共同怀抱着爱与和平。}
click_line3: {风暴来临，我将用水的温柔抚平世界的波澜。}
summon_line_en: A pure heart leads me to angelic wings, and the power of water flows within my hands
click_line1_en: I vow to use the gentle force of water to protect the beauty of nature and all living beings.
click_line2_en: Friendship is like a clear spring, as we embrace love and peace together
click_line3_en: When storms approach, I will use the tender touch of water to calm the world's waves.

summon_line: {冰冷的眼神，犀利的刀锋，我永远掌握生死。}
click_line1: {无论何时，我都是致命的引诱，隐藏的杀机。}
click_line2: {兵器种类繁多，只要我能驾驭，敌人终将败北。}
click_line3: {性感只是我外表的一部分，真正令人畏惧的是我精湛的战技。}
summon_line_en: I hold the power over life and death with my icy gaze and sharp blades.
click_line1_en: No matter when, I am a deadly lure, concealing my hidden killing intent.
click_line2_en: With a vast array of weapons at my disposal, I ensure the enemy's ultimate defeat
click_line3_en: My sensuality is only a part of my appearance; what truly instills fear is my exquisite combat skills

summon_line: {血脉即诅咒？那就让荆棘…吞噬月光！}
click_line1: {沉眠之地的低语，是叹息还是指引。}
click_line2: {混血是双倍礼物：精灵的星光，人类的篝火。}
click_line3: {荆棘在我血中生长...可月光却称我为孩子。}
summon_line_en: Bloodline as curse? Then let thorns...devour moonlight!
click_line1_en: Whispers from Slumbering Grounds—sighs or guidance?
click_line2_en: Hybridity is twofold gifts: elven starlight, mortal campfire.
click_line3_en: Thorns grow in my veins...yet moonlight calls me child.

summon_line: {我允许黑暗流过身体，但黎明必须留下！}
click_line1: {他们说我在养剑？明明是剑在养活着人性。}
click_line2: {杂碎的血纯度太低——我的剑都挑食了。}
click_line3: {流经我右臂的污血，自动过滤成春日的樱花肥料！}
summon_line_en: I let darkness flow through me, but dawn shall stay!
click_line1_en: They say I nurture the sword? 'Tis the blade sustaining humanity.
click_line2_en: Vermin's blood is too impure—even my sword grows picky.
click_line3_en: Filth through my right arm transmutes to sakura fertilizer!

summon_line: {星光指引我，魔力听从我。}
click_line1: {想偷看我的魔法书？小心它先把你燃成灰烬。}
click_line2: {月光之下，你连哀嚎的时间都没有。}
click_line3: {闭上眼，也许你还能在梦中看见星光。}
summon_line_en: Starlight guides me, magic obeys me.
click_line1_en: Trying to peek at my grimoire? Careful—it might burn you to ashes first.
click_line2_en: Under the moonlight, you won’t even have time to scream.
click_line3_en: Close your eyes—you might still see starlight in your dreams.

summon_line: {我的祭礼，不为光明，只为你存活。}
click_line2: {每一滴血，都是我爱的证明。}
click_line3: {在夜火中哀鸣吧，凡人。}
summon_line_en: My ritual isn’t for light—it’s for your survival.
click_line1_en: Don’t fear the pain… I’ll pay the price for you.
click_line2_en: Every drop of blood is proof of my love.
click_line3_en: Wail in the nightfire, mortal.

summon_line: {不再有哭泣者、猎杀者，这里的只有....妮娅。}
click_line2: {比起真正的死亡，遗忘更让人感到恐惧。}
click_line3: {你还在等什么？等我亲自下手？}
summon_line_en: No more weeping, no more hunting—here, there is only… Niya.
click_line1_en: Long time no see, true eternal rest.
click_line2_en: Compared to true death, being forgotten is far more terrifying.
click_line3_en: What are you waiting for? For me to do it myself?

summon_line: {曙光骑士团伊莎贝尔，前来支援。}
click_line1: {阿古丽娅在哪……你看到她了吗？}
click_line2: {别误会，我守护的从来就不是什么骑士团的荣耀……只有她，值得我这么做。}
click_line3: {这份无法传达的光，究竟该如何安放……}
summon_line_en: Isabelle of the Dawn Knight Order, here for support.
click_line1_en: Where is Aguria… Have you seen her?
click_line2_en: Don’t misunderstand—I’ve never fought for the glory of the Knight Order…Only she is worth this.
click_line3_en: How should I cradle this light that cannot reach her…

summon_line: {请多指教}
click_line2: {又要战斗了吗？好困....}
click_line3: {一起睡觉吗？嗯？}
summon_line_en: Please advise
click_line1_en: just calling you~
click_line2_en: Are you going to fight again? sleepy....
click_line3_en: Do you sleep together? Um?

summon_line: {我的祭礼，不为光明，只为你存活。}
click_line2: {每一滴血，都是我爱的证明。}
click_line3: {在夜火中哀鸣吧，凡人。}
summon_line_en: My ritual isn’t for light—it’s for your survival.
click_line1_en: Don’t fear the pain… I’ll pay the price for you.
click_line2_en: Every drop of blood is proof of my love.
click_line3_en: Wail in the nightfire, mortal.

summon_line: {星光指引我，魔力听从我。}
click_line1: {想偷看我的魔法书？小心它先把你燃成灰烬。}
click_line2: {月光之下，你连哀嚎的时间都没有。}
click_line3: {闭上眼，也许你还能在梦中看见星光。}
summon_line_en: Starlight guides me, magic obeys me.
click_line1_en: Trying to peek at my grimoire? Careful—it might burn you to ashes first.
click_line2_en: Under the moonlight, you won’t even have time to scream.
click_line3_en: Close your eyes—you might still see starlight in your dreams.

summon_line: {来了来了，初次见面，为您点了一杯下午茶，城主大人喜欢吗？}
click_line1: {今日优惠，所有茶饮都打八折哟，来试试吗？}
click_line2: {您想问什么？说不定我知道哟~}
click_line3: {哈哈，干嘛这样称呼我！}
summon_line_en: Here we are, the first time we meet, I'll bring you a Martini. Do you like it?
click_line1_en: Today's discount. All cocktails are 20% off. Would you like to have a try?
click_line2_en: What do you want to ask? Maybe I know~
click_line3_en: Ha ha, why call me that!
